TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Bob Anderegg nalecuhan i Monroe, Wisconsin, nanu syubay kanas-mali miunduay nu Amilika NBA nisakaput, pahanhanan tu kawaw ayza. Bob Anderegg i 1959 a mihcan NBA sapapili' mimaliay a kawaw, saka 3 ku uwac atu silsil 20, namapili' tu nu New York Knicks putiput. 8 bulad 24 demiad, 1937 a mihca, Bob Anderegg, miunduay.
S.PHON: bob andərəgg nar~ɾəʦuħan i monroə, wisʦonsin, nanu sjubaj kanas-mar~ɾi miunduaj nu amir~ɾika nba nisakaput, paħanħanan tu kawaw ajza. bob andərəgg i **** a miħʦan nba sapapir~ɾiʔ~ʡ mimar~ɾiaj a kawaw, saka * ku uwaʦ atu sir~ɾsir~ɾ **, namapir~ɾiʔ~ʡ tu nu nəw jork kniʦks putiput. * bur~ɾad ** dəmiad, **** a miħʦa, bob andərəgg, miunduaj.
S.FORM: Bob Anderegg nalecuhan i Monroe, Wisconsin, nanu syubay kanas-mali miunduay nu Amilika NBA nisakaput, pahanhanan tu kawaw ayza. Bob Anderegg i 1959 a mihcan NBA sapapili' mimaliay a kawaw, saka 3 ku uwac atu silsil 20, namapili' tu nu New York Knicks putiput. 8 bulad 24 demiad, 1937 a mihca, Bob Anderegg, miunduay.
S.PHON: bob andərəgg nar~ɾəʦuħan i monroə, wisʦonsin, nanu sjubaj kanas-mar~ɾi miunduaj nu amir~ɾika nba nisakaput, paħanħanan tu kawaw ajza. bob andərəgg i **** a miħʦan nba sapapir~ɾiʔ~ʡ mimar~ɾiaj a kawaw, saka * ku uwaʦ atu sir~ɾsir~ɾ **, namapir~ɾiʔ~ʡ tu nu nəw jork kniʦks putiput. * bur~ɾad ** dəmiad, **** a miħʦa, bob andərəgg, miunduaj.
